final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration of a cyberpunk future city nightscape.

Style/medium: needs a cyberpunk aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include towering skyscrapers, flying vehicles weaving through buildings, and reflective puddles on the ground
Subject: must include flying cars traversing between buildings
Scene/backdrop: must include a dense futuristic cityscape at night with acid rain falling and water puddles reflecting neon lights
Lighting/mood: needs a neon-lit night atmosphere with a sense of technological wonder and urban decay — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be blue-purple dominant
Materials/textures: needs a wet, reflective surface treatment for ground puddles — exact sheen and water texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
